summary: Iteration 146: Chiusura Diretta (Close without certification) feature - ALL 10 BACKEND TESTS PASS + FULL FRONTEND UI VERIFICATION. New POST /api/commesse/{id}/complete-simple endpoint successfully tested. Frontend button 'Chiudi senza certificazione' appears correctly on CommessaHubPage for active states and is hidden for closed/suspended states.

issues: Minor: Dialog has console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' - accessibility enhancement suggested

reject_close_already_chiuso.detail: Returns 400 with message 'Chiusura diretta non permessa dallo stato chiuso'

event_chiusura_diretta_recorded.detail: CHIUSURA_DIRETTA event recorded in timeline with note and operator info

allowed_states_validation.detail: CHIUSURA_DIRETTA_ALLOWED includes: richiesta, bozza, rilievo_completato, firmato, in_produzione, fatturato. Excludes: chiuso, sospesa

frontend_button_defined.detail: CommessaHubPage.js has CHIUSURA_DIRETTA_STATES, button with data-testid='action-CHIUSURA_DIRETTA', dialog with data-testid='close-simple-dialog'

frontend_ui_button_visible.detail: Button 'Chiudi senza certificazione' visible on CommessaHubPage for commessa with 'firmato' state

frontend_ui_dialog_opens.detail: Dialog opens with Italian text, note textarea, Annulla/Chiudi Commessa buttons

frontend_ui_close_action.detail: Clicking confirm changes stato badge to 'Chiuso', shows success toast 'Commessa chiusa con successo'

frontend_ui_button_hidden_for_closed.detail: Button NOT visible for commessa already in 'chiuso' state - no AZIONI DISPONIBILI section shown

critical_code_review_comments: Backend routes/commesse.py lines 1142-1201: New endpoint complete-simple correctly validates state before closing
Backend CHIUSURA_DIRETTA_ALLOWED list at line 1144-1147 correctly excludes 'chiuso' and 'sospesa' states
Frontend CommessaHubPage.js line 61: CHIUSURA_DIRETTA_STATES matches backend allowed states
Frontend handles optional note correctly - sends empty object {} when no note provided
CHIUSURA_DIRETTA event correctly recorded with operatore_id, operatore_nome, note, and timestamp

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4 UI verification tests passed via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test commesse: com_a418e85eb68a (richiesta), com_a9450707e479 (richiesta), com_1fa6adc6ca90 (firmato), com_e8c4810ad476 (chiuso)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 146 fully verified the 'Chiudi senza certificazione' feature. Backend endpoint POST /api/commesse/{id}/complete-simple works correctly - changes stato to 'chiuso', status to 'completato', records CHIUSURA_DIRETTA event. Frontend CommessaHubPage shows button only for active states (richiesta, bozza, rilievo_completato, firmato, in_produzione, fatturato), hides it for chiuso/sospesa. Dialog has Italian text, optional note textarea, confirm button. All tests pass.

mocked_apis.note: All tests hit real backend API and MongoDB database
